title: IMMI-Case- Three-Epic Sprint
description: UI/UX refinement, api.py test coverage increase, and cursor pagination implementation

stories.title: Add 'data' font family to design tokens for dense list areas
acceptanceCriteria: tokens.json has typography.fontFamily.data set to ['DM Sans', 'IBM Plex Sans', 'system-ui', 'sans-serif']
tokens.css and tokens.ts are regenerated (run build-tokens script) and include --font-data CSS variable
tailwind.config.js / CSS exposes font-data utility class
Unit test in frontend/__tests__ verifies tokens.ts exports fontFamily.data

stories.title: Apply data font to CasesPage list rows for dense-list readability
acceptanceCriteria: CasesPage.tsx case row elements use font-data class (or equivalent CSS var) instead of default body font
Vitest snapshot / unit test confirms CasesPage renders with data font class on list items
No TypeScript errors after change (npx tsc --noEmit passes)
Frontend build passes (npm run build)

stories.title: Analytics chart visual language: Grafana-style data dashboard improvements
acceptanceCriteria: Recharts components in analytics sections use chart color tokens (color.chart.*) consistently with no hardcoded hex values
All Tooltip contentStyle includes color: 'var(--color-text)' for dark-mode readability
CartesianGrid strokeDasharray is applied to all bar/line charts for gridline clarity
At least one Vitest test confirms chart component renders with correct color token class
No TypeScript errors (npx tsc --noEmit passes)

stories.title: Tests for analytics judge endpoints (judge-leaderboard, judge-profile, judge-compare, judge-bio)
acceptanceCriteria: tests/test_analytics_judge_api.py exists with >= 20 tests covering /analytics/judge-leaderboard, /analytics/judge-profile, /analytics/judge-compare, /analytics/judge-bio
Tests cover: 200 success, empty data, invalid params, missing required params
Each test fails deliberately when wrong value asserted (red-green verification done)
python3 -m pytest tests/test_analytics_judge_api.py passes 100%
Coverage for judge-related code blocks in api.py increases (measurable via --cov)

stories.title: Tests for concept analytics endpoints (concept-effectiveness, concept-cooccurrence, concept-trends, flow-matrix, monthly-trends)
acceptanceCriteria: tests/test_analytics_concepts_api.py exists with >= 15 tests
Covers: /analytics/concept-effectiveness, /concept-cooccurrence, /concept-trends, /analytics/flow-matrix, /analytics/monthly-trends
Tests cover: 200 success path, empty repo, filter params
python3 -m pytest tests/test_analytics_concepts_api.py passes 100%
Red-green verification documented in test file docstring

stories.title: Tests for export, search, and helper utility functions in api.py
acceptanceCriteria: tests/test_api_helpers.py exists with >= 15 tests covering _normalise_judge_name, _is_real_judge_name, _normalise_outcome, _normalise_concept, _split_concepts, _split_judges, _valid_case_id, _parse_case_date
tests/test_export_search_api.py exists with >= 10 tests covering /export/csv, /export/json, /search endpoint
All tests pass with python3 -m pytest tests/test_api_helpers.py tests/test_export_search_api.py
Coverage of api.py helper functions reaches >= 60%

stories.title: Backend: expose next_cursor token in /api/v1/cases response
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/v1/cases response JSON includes next_cursor field (base64url-encoded SeekAnchor or null if no next page)
next_cursor is null when on the last page or when seek pagination is not available (offset_fallback)
GET /api/v1/cases?cursor=<token> accepts the cursor and returns the correct next page
Existing tests in tests/test_cases_api.py still pass (no regression)
New tests in tests/test_cursor_pagination.py cover: cursor present when has-next-page, cursor null on last page, cursor round-trip (use cursor to fetch next page)

stories.title: Frontend: update use-cases.ts hook to support cursor-based pagination
acceptanceCriteria: useCases hook in frontend/src/hooks/use-cases.ts accepts optional cursor param
When cursor is provided, it is sent as ?cursor=<token> to /api/v1/cases
CasesPage.tsx can use next_cursor from response for 'load more' or efficient page navigation
No TypeScript errors (npx tsc --noEmit passes)
Frontend Vitest test in frontend/__tests__/use-cases.test.ts covers cursor-fetch scenario
